## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Device: (e.g. OnePlus 13)
- Android version: (e.g. Android 15)
- App version: (e.g. 1.0.0)
- Flutter version (if building from source): `flutter --version`

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
